aboutPage.title: About the Journal
aboutPage.text:
**ScieJournalVSTU** is a peer-reviewed scientific journal published by Volgograd State Technical University. The journal provides a platform for publishing original scientific research, review articles, and other scientific materials that match the journal's scope.

### Mission Statement

The main purpose of the journal is to promote the development of science and technology, disseminate current scientific knowledge, and ensure open access to the research results of scientists and specialists in relevant fields. The journal adheres to high standards of publication ethics and objective peer review.

### Frequency and Indexing

The journal is published on a regular schedule (e.g., quarterly or semiannually). The editorial office works towards including the journal in leading Russian and international scientific citation databases.

### Organizational Structure

The activities of the journal are managed by the editor-in-chief with support from the editorial board, which includes leading scientists and experts. The editorial board is responsible for the scientific content, peer review, and publication decisions.

forAuthorsPage.title: Guidelines for Authors
forAuthorsPage.empty: Guidelines for authors have not been published yet
forAuthorsPage.text:
### General Requirements

Publications accept previously unpublished articles that are not under consideration by other journals. Authors guarantee the originality of the submitted materials and the absence of plagiarism. In case of co-authorship, all authors must be familiar with the manuscript text and agree to its submission.

### Submission Process

Manuscripts are submitted through the journal's electronic management system (for example, on the RIS RCNI platform or similar). To submit an article, you need to:

- Register in the system (provide accurate data: full name, affiliation, academic degree, e-mail).
- Upload article files in accordance with formatting requirements.
- Attach required supporting documents: license agreement, expert opinion on the possibility of publication (if necessary).

### Manuscript Structure

The manuscript should contain the following elements in the following order:

1. **Title of the article** (in Russian and English).
2. **Author information** (full name, academic degree, academic title, position, workplace, city, country, contact e-mail) in both Russian and English.
3. **Abstract** (250–300 words) — a brief overview of the objectives, methods, main results, and conclusions of the study. The English version of the abstract should be informative and original (not a direct translation of the Russian text).
4. **Keywords** (5–15 words/phrases) in both Russian and English.
5. **Main text of the article**, structured by sections: Introduction, Methods, Results, Discussion, Conclusion (for original research) or by logic of presentation (for reviews).
6. **Acknowledgments** (if necessary) — indication of funding sources.
7. **References/Bibliography** — formatted in accordance with journal requirements (for example, GOST R 7.0.5-2008 or APA style).
8. **References** — the bibliography transliterated and translated into English.

### Technical Formatting Requirements

- File format: Microsoft Word (`.doc` or `.docx`).
- Font: Times New Roman or similar, size 12–14 pt for the main text.
- Line spacing: 1.5 or single.
- Margins: standard (2–2.5 cm).
- Article volume: no more than the established limit (for example, up to 40,000 characters with spaces).
- Illustrations and tables are provided as separate files in formats that ensure high quality (JPEG, PNG, TIFF).

### Copyright and License Agreement

By submitting a manuscript to the journal, authors enter into a license agreement with the editorial board, which grants the right to first publication and distribution of the article under the terms of the chosen CC BY license. Authors retain copyright to their work but consent to its dissemination in open access.

openAccessPage.title: Open Access Policy
openAccessPage.empty: The open access policy text has not been published yet
openAccessPage.text:
The Scientific Journal of VolgSTU (ScieJournalVstu) adheres to an Open Access policy for published scientific materials. This is in accordance with the principles of the Budapest Open Access Initiative (BOAI) and promotes the global exchange of knowledge and the advancement of science.

### Access for Readers

All articles published in the journal are freely available on the Internet without charge and without registration immediately upon publication. Full-text versions are posted on the journal's official website, as well as on the platforms of the Scientific Electronic Library eLIBRARY.RU and other scientific information aggregators. Any user has the right to read, download, copy, distribute, print, search, or link to the full texts of articles, as well as use them for any other lawful purposes, without prior permission from the author or publisher.

### Licensing

All journal materials are distributed under the terms of the **Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0)** license, unless otherwise stated. This means that when using published materials, it is necessary to:

- provide proper attribution to the authors and indicate the original publication in the journal;
- retain attribution and bibliographic data in any use of the materials.

### Article Processing Charge (APC)

The journal may charge an Article Processing Charge (APC) in accordance with the current Price List. The fee is charged **only after the official acceptance of the manuscript for publication** and does not affect the peer review process or editorial decisions. Advance payment is not permitted. Exemptions or discounts may be granted for certain categories of authors.

### Identification and Archiving

Every published article is assigned a Digital Object Identifier (**DOI**) through the Crossref system, ensuring permanent identification and linking to the publication. The journal takes measures to ensure long-term preservation and availability of published content through backup and archiving systems.

jobsPage.text:
**ScieJournalVSTU** is a peer-reviewed scientific journal published by Volgograd State Technical University. The journal provides a platform for publishing original scientific research, review articles, and other scientific materials that match the journal's scope.

### Mission Statement

The main purpose of the journal is to promote the development of science and technology, disseminate current scientific knowledge, and ensure open access to the research results of scientists and specialists in relevant fields. The journal adheres to high standards of publication ethics and objective peer review.

### Frequency and Indexing

The journal is published on a regular schedule (e.g., quarterly or semiannually). The editorial office works towards including the journal in leading Russian and international scientific citation databases.

### Organizational Structure

reviewersPage.title: Guidelines for Reviewers
reviewersPage.empty: Reviewer guidelines have not been published yet
reviewersPage.text:
Peer review is a mandatory stage of scientific material selection, guaranteeing the quality and accuracy of published research. The journal adheres to the **double-blind review** model, in which the reviewer does not know the author's name, and the author does not know the reviewer's name.

### Reviewer Criteria

Peer review involves recognized specialists in the relevant scientific field who have publications on the topic of the reviewed article within the past three years. The reviewer must not be in a conflict of interest (be a co-author, work at the same organization, or have other personal connections with the author).

### Review Process

The process includes several stages and is carried out through the journal management system:

1. **Invitation receipt**: The editor sends the reviewer an invitation and a brief abstract of the manuscript.
2. **Consent or refusal**: The reviewer must confirm their consent (or motivated refusal) to conduct the review within the specified time frame.
3. **Familiarization with the manuscript**: Upon receiving access to the manuscript files, the reviewer studies the full text of the article (without author information) and additional materials.
4. **Preparing the review**: The reviewer fills out a special form or prepares a detailed assessment containing an evaluation of the following aspects:

    - Relevance of the topic.
    - Scientific novelty and practical significance of the results.
    - Compliance of methods and approaches with the current level of research.
    - Justification of conclusions.
    - Quality of formatting and writing style.
    - Remarks and recommendations for improving the article.

5. **Recommendation**: In the final part, the reviewer provides one of the following recommendations:

    - Accept for publication.
    - Accept after appropriate revision.
    - Reject.

### Confidentiality and Review Ethics

The reviewer is obliged not to disclose information contained in the manuscript until its official publication. The review is published together with the article only with the reviewer's consent.

editorsPage.title: Guidelines for Editors
editorsPage.empty: Editor guidelines have not been published yet
editorsPage.text:
Managing the publication process — from the moment of manuscript submission to its release — is a key stage in the operation of a scientific journal. The main task of the editorial board is to ensure that the materials meet the scientific level, ethical standards, and formal requirements of the journal.

### Responsibilities of the Editor-in-Chief

The editor-in-chief oversees the overall management of the journal and performs the following functions:

- Determines strategic directions for the development of the journal and the theme issues.
- Approves the plan for preparation and release of each issue of the journal.
- Appoints members of the editorial board and external reviewers.
- Makes decisions on the publication of articles based on the results of peer review and conclusions of editorial board members.
- Ensures objectivity and impartiality in the manuscript review process.
- Monitors compliance with publication ethics and rules for authors and reviewers.
- Coordinates the work of the editorial board.
- Maintains communication with authors, reviewers, and publishing platforms.

### Functions of the Executive Editor and Editorial Board Members

- Registration of received manuscripts and their initial verification (correspondence to the theme, formatting rules, plagiarism check).
- Appointment of reviewers from among scientific experts.
- Monitoring review deadlines and communicating with reviewers.
- Preparing the final decision on the manuscript for the author based on reviews.
- Managing documentation and forming journal issues.

### Interaction with Authors

The editorial board sends authors the results of peer review, containing remarks and recommendations. If the author disagrees with the remarks, they may submit a motivated statement. Revised articles may be sent for repeated review. Correspondence is conducted only with the corresponding author.

termsOfUsePage.title: Terms of Use
termsOfUsePage.empty: Terms of use have not been published yet
termsOfUsePage.text:
### General Provisions

These Terms of Use govern the relationship between the Operator (Scientific Journal of VolgSTU) and the Website User. Using the website means full and unconditional acceptance of the conditions of this Agreement and the Privacy Policy. If the User does not agree with the terms, they must stop using the website.

### Registration

Access to some website services (for example, submitting articles, receiving notifications) requires registration. The User agrees to provide accurate data and update it in a timely manner. The User is responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their registration data (login and password) and for all actions performed using them.

### Rights and Responsibilities of the Parties

- **The User** agrees not to use the website for illegal purposes, not to violate the rights of third parties, and not to distribute malicious programs.

- **The Operator** agrees to provide access to the website and its functionality, process personal data in accordance with legislation, and ensure their protection.

### Changes to Terms

The Operator has the right to make changes to the Terms of Use at any time without prior notice. The User agrees to independently monitor updates on the website. Continued use of the website after changes means the User's agreement with the new edition.

privacyPolicyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicyPage.empty: Privacy policy has not been published yet
privacyPolicyPage.text:
### General Provisions

This Policy is developed in accordance with the requirements of Federal Law No. 152-FZ dated July 27, 2006 "On Personal Data" and defines the procedure for processing and protecting personal data of Users of the Scientific Journal of VolgSTU website.

### What Data Is Collected

The website may collect and process the following information about Users:

- **Provided data**: full name, email address, workplace, academic degree, position, contact phone number, and other data indicated during registration or submission of materials.

- **Automatically collected data**: IP address, browser type, cookie data, device information, date and time of access, addresses of requested pages.

### Purposes of Data Processing

Personal data is processed for the following purposes:

- Identifying the User and creating an account.
- Providing access to website services (submitting manuscripts, reviewing, personal account).
- Carrying out editorial activities (communication with authors, reviewers, editorial board members).
- Fulfilling legislative requirements in the field of media and publishing activities.
- Improving website functionality and conducting statistical research.

### Conditions for Sharing Data with Third Parties

The Operator does not share Users' personal data with third parties, except in the following cases:

- When the User has given explicit consent.
- When sharing is necessary to fulfill obligations to the User (for example, posting an article in open access with attribution).
- When sharing is required by the legislation of the Russian Federation.

### Data Protection

The Operator takes necessary organizational and technical measures to protect personal data from unauthorized access, destruction, alteration, blocking, copying, distribution, as well as from any other unlawful actions by third parties.

termsAndConditionsPage.title: Terms and Conditions
termsAndConditionsPage.empty: Terms and conditions have not been published yet
termsAndConditionsPage.text:
### Submission of Materials

Materials for publication are submitted through the journal's official website. The editorial office accepts for review only those manuscripts that are formatted in accordance with the rules for authors.

### Peer Review

All submitted manuscripts undergo mandatory independent peer review. The editorial office reserves the right to reject a manuscript without publication if it does not match the theme, formatting requirements, or received a negative evaluation from reviewers.

### Publication Ethics

The journal follows publication ethics principles developed by the Committee on Publication Ethics (COPE). Plagiarism, data falsification, and duplicate publications are not acceptable.

### Publishing Rights

By publishing an article in the journal, authors grant the editorial board the right to distribute it in electronic and print formats, as well as to place it in abstracting databases. Authors retain copyright to their work.

- **Email**: [editorial address]
- **Phone**: [contact phone number]

### Contacts for Reviewers

For reviewers who need technical support when working in the review system or have questions about the procedure:

- **Email**: [reviewer support address]

### Technical Support

For website issues, personal account login, password recovery, and other technical problems:

- **Email**: [technical support address]
- **Instructions**: [link to system usage instructions]
